data.name: severity.info
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.info in blocks-scheduling context — status badge for informational scheduling messages (e.g., event scheduled, allocation accepted). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.warning
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.warning in blocks-scheduling context — status badge for non-blocking scheduling concerns (e.g., overlapping booking, near-capacity allocation). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.error
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.error in blocks-scheduling context — status badge for blocking scheduling failures (e.g., conflicting reservation, invalid recurrence). Short noun; sentence case.

data.name: severity.critical
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] severity.critical in blocks-scheduling context — status badge for capacity-impacting failures (e.g., calendar sync broken across the org). Pairs with high-attention visual styling.

data.name: action.save
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.save in blocks-scheduling context — pilot string for the cluster-B cascade proof. UI button or status label when persisting a schedule entry (event, allocation, calendar item) across the SunfishScheduler / SunfishAllocationScheduler / SunfishCalendar view-switcher. Imperative; sentence case. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis indicates in-progress.

data.name: action.cancel
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.cancel in blocks-scheduling context — dismiss/abort button on schedule edit dialogs and view-switch flows. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: action.retry
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] action.retry in blocks-scheduling context — retry button after a save, sync, or recurrence-expansion failure. Imperative; sentence case.

data.name: state.loading
data.comment: [scaffold-pilot — replace in Plan 6] state.loading in blocks-scheduling context — empty-state placeholder while fetching schedule data across views. Trailing U+2026 ellipsis (single character); translators preserve the convention.
